steps.title: Use the stated founding purpose
steps.content: The passage directly says Okeke and her team founded U-recycle Initiative Africa to teach young people how their actions affect the environment and why recycling is important. The art exhibit is just one example of that educational mission.

steps.title: Reject unsupported purposes
steps.content: Choice A shifts to overlooked artists. Choice C mentions adults and outdoor skills. Choice D turns Okeke's age into business advice, which the passage never gives. The answer is B.
